# nomad_quota_specification (Resource)

Manages a quota specification in a Nomad cluster.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "nomad_quota_specification" "prod_api" {
  name        = "prod-api"
  description = "Production instances of backend API servers"

  limits {
    region = "global"

    region_limit {
      cpu          = 2400
      cores        = 4
      memory_mb    = 1200
      memory_max_mb = 2400

      devices {
        name  = "nvidia/gpu"
        count = 2
      }

      node_pools {
        node_pool     = "batch"
        cpu           = 800
        cores         = 2
        memory_mb     = 1024
        memory_max_mb = 2048

        devices {
          name  = "fpga"
          count = 1
        }

        storage {
          variables_mb    = 25
          host_volumes_mb = 50
        }
      }

      storage {
        variables_mb    = 500
        host_volumes_mb = 1000
      }
    }
  }
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `limits` (Block Set, Min: 1) Limits encapsulated by this quota specification. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--limits))
- `name` (String) Unique name for this quota specification.

### Optional

- `description` (String) Description for this quota specification.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.

<a id="nestedblock--limits"></a>
### Nested Schema for `limits`

Required:

- `region` (String) Region in which this limit has affect.
- `region_limit` (Block Set, Min: 1, Max: 1) The limit applied to this region. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--limits--region_limit))

<a id="nestedblock--limits--region_limit"></a>
### Nested Schema for `limits.region_limit`

Optional:

- `cores` (Number)
- `cpu` (Number)
- `devices` (Block List) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--limits--region_limit--devices))
- `memory_max_mb` (Number)
- `memory_mb` (Number)
- `node_pools` (Block List) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--limits--region_limit--node_pools))
- `storage` (Block List, Max: 1) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--limits--region_limit--storage))

Required:

- `count` (Number)
